<script id="vslyAntiFlickerScript-OJ93" data-em-disable>
    console.debug('vsly-anti-flicker', 'Anti Flicker Script Loaded');
    let fallbackTimer = -1;
    let retryTimer = -1;
    let retries = 0;

    function _vslyAntiFlickerRevealInner() {
        try {
            console.debug('vsly-anti-flicker', 'Revealing');
            const hideElem = document.querySelector('#vslyAntiFlickerStyle-AE29');
            if (hideElem) {
                hideElem.remove();
            }
            clearTimeout(fallbackTimer);
            console.debug('vsly-anti-flicker', 'Revealing done');
        } catch (ex) {
            console.error('vsly-anti-flicker', ex);
            if (retries > 15) {
                setTimeout(window.vslyAntiFlickerReveal, 10);
                retries += 1;
            }
        }
    }

    window.vslyAntiFlickerReveal = function () {
        setTimeout(_vslyAntiFlickerRevealInner, 10);
    }

    fallbackTimer = setTimeout(() => {
        console.debug('vsly-anti-flicker', 'Falling back after timeout');
        window._vslyAntiFlickerRevealInner()
        clearTimeout(retryTimer)
    }, 500)
</script>
<!--End - Anti Flicker-->

    <script>
    (async function () {
        window.Stylux = {
        queue: [],
        onScriptLoad: (fn) => {
            window.Stylux.queue.push(fn);
        },
    };

    (function loadStyluxSDK(src, onload) {
        const script = document.createElement('script');
        script.src = src;
        script.async = true;
        script.crossOrigin = 'anonymous';
        script.onload = onload;
        document.head.appendChild(script);
        })('https://sdk.stylux.io/js-sdk.js', async () => {
            if (!self.Stylux) {
                return;
            }

            if (!self.Shopify || self.Shopify.country !== 'US') {
                return;
            }
            
            await Stylux.setup({
                merchantId: '82ea1eac-691e-4458-abbe-fa8c288b6a2c',
                monitoring: true,

                apiKey: 'STLX_aa11aeb4a872542e0fc15ac1083e42a6f2c47eef16f11373999f4606797f',

                getButtonOfferText(config) {
                    return config.ctaText;
                },

                modal: {
                    buttonStyles: {},
                },

                selectors: {
                    offers: {
                        BUTTON: '.stylux-offer-container',
                    },
                },

                plugins: {
                    shopify: {
                        addToCartSelector: '.add-to-cart, [pre-order-btn="Add to Cart"]',
                        sectionsForCartRequests: ['cart-drawer', 'cart-icon-bubble'],
                        detectVariantChanges: false,
                        getActiveSellingPlanId: () => {
                                const VisuallyRenderElement = document.getElementsByTagName('visually-render')?.[0]
                                if (VisuallyRenderElement) {
                                    const sellingPlan = VisuallyRenderElement?.selectedProduct?.subscription_id;
                                    return sellingPlan
                                }
                                const selectedAtc = document.querySelector('.variant-atcs.active');
                                if (selectedAtc) {
                                    const selectedColor = selectedAtc.querySelector('.is-color.selectedColor');
                                    const subId = selectedColor?.dataset?.sub;
                                    const noSubAtc = selectedAtc.querySelector('.no-sub__atc');
                                    if (noSubAtc) {
                                        return null;
                                    }
                                    return subId;
                                }
                                return null;
                        },
                        afterUpdateCartVersion: 'V2',
                        afterUpdateCart(updateCartRes) {
                            if (!updateCartRes) {
                                return;
                            }

                            const isCartPage = document.location.pathname.includes('cart');

                            if (isCartPage) {
                                window.location.reload();
                            } else {
                                const cartSectionsToUpdate = ['cart-drawer__content', 'cart-icon-bubble', 'cart-drawer__header', 'cart-drawer__footer']
                                    .map(id => ({
                                        id,
                                        section: document.getElementById(id).dataset.id || id,
                                        selector: id === 'cart-icon-bubble' ? '.shopify-section' : `#${id}`
                                }));

                                cartSectionsToUpdate.forEach(({ id, selector, section }) => {
                                    const el = document.getElementById(id).querySelector(selector) || document.getElementById(id)
                                    el.innerHTML = this.getSectionInnerHTML(updateCartRes.cart.sections[section], selector)
                                })
                                document.querySelector('cart-drawer')?.open()
                                document.dispatchEvent(new Event("stylux:cart.update", { bubbles: true }))
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            })
        });
     })();
</script>

        var w=els[i].closest('[class*="tolstoy-grid"]')||els[i].closest('.tolstoy-collection-page-tile-wrapper');
        if(w) w.style.setProperty('display','none','important');
      }
    }
    if(document.readyState==='loading'){
      document.addEventListener('DOMContentLoaded',hideOrphanedTiles);
    }else{
      hideOrphanedTiles();
    }
  })();
</script>

      })

      .then(() => window.location.reload())
    },
    status: async () => {
      const response = await fetch('/cart.js');
      const json = await response.json();
      console.log(json.attributes);
    }
  }
</script>
